properties.areaDesc: Vega Alta, PR; Vega Baja, PR
properties.headline: Flash Flood Warning issued March 27 at 8:59PM AST until March 28 at 12:00AM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
At 859 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated thunderstorms producing heavy
rain across the warned area. Between 2 and 4 inches of rain have
fallen. Additional rainfall amounts of 1 to 2 inches are possible in
the warned area. Flash flooding is ongoing or expected to begin
shortly.

HAZARD...Flash flooding caused by thunderstorms.

SOURCE...Radar.

IMPACT...Flash flooding of small creeks and streams, urban areas,
highways, streets and underpasses as well as other poor
drainage and low-lying areas.
properties.instruction:
Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood
deaths occur in vehicles.

Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

NWSheadline: FLASH FLOOD WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL MIDNIGHT AST TONIGHT FOR VEGA ALTA AND VEGA BAJA

properties.areaDesc: Arecibo, PR; Camuy, PR; Hatillo, PR
properties.headline: Flash Flood Warning issued March 27 at 8:04PM AST until March 27 at 10:15PM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
FFWSJU

The National Weather Service in San Juan has extended the

* Flash Flood Warning for...
Northern Arecibo, Camuy and Hatillo in Puerto Rico...

* Until 1015 PM AST.

* At 804 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated thunderstorms producing
heavy rain across the warned area. Between 1 and 2 inches of rain
have fallen. Additional rainfall amounts of 1 to 2 inches are
possible in the warned area. Flash flooding is ongoing or expected
to begin shortly.

HAZARD...Flash flooding caused by thunderstorms.

SOURCE...Radar.

IMPACT...Flash flooding of small creeks and streams, urban
areas, highways, streets and underpasses as well as
other poor drainage and low-lying areas.
properties.instruction:
Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood
deaths occur in vehicles.

Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

properties.areaDesc: Ciales, PR; Jayuya, PR; Morovis, PR; Orocovis, PR; Utuado, PR
properties.headline: Flood Advisory issued March 27 at 7:37PM AST until March 27 at 10:00PM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
* WHAT...Urban and small stream flooding caused by excessive
rainfall continues.

* WHERE...Ciales, Jayuya, Morovis, Orocovis and Utuado.

* WHEN...Until 1000 PM AST.

* IMPACTS...Dangerous flows over low-water crossings. Water over
roadways.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- At 737 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated heavy rain due to
thunderstorms. This will cause urban and small stream
flooding. Between 2 and 3 inches of rain have fallen.
properties.instruction:
Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood
deaths occur in vehicles.

NWSheadline: FLOOD ADVISORY NOW IN EFFECT UNTIL 10 PM AST THIS EVENING

properties.areaDesc: Barceloneta, PR; Dorado, PR; Florida, PR; Manati, PR; Toa Baja, PR; Vega Alta, PR; Vega Baja, PR
properties.headline: Flood Advisory issued March 27 at 7:35PM AST until March 27 at 11:00PM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
Additional showers are expected to reach these municipalities
tonight, likely resulting in urban and small stream flooding.

* WHAT...Urban and small stream flooding caused by excessive
rainfall is expected.

* WHERE...Barceloneta, Dorado, Florida, Manati, Toa Baja, Vega Alta
and Vega Baja.

* WHEN...Until 1100 PM AST.

* IMPACTS...Dangerous flows over low-water crossings. Water over
roadways.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- At 734 PM AST, Doppler radar indicated heavy rain due to
thunderstorms. This will cause urban and small stream
flooding.
- Additional rainfall amounts of 1 to 2 inches are expected
over the area. This additional rain will result in minor
flooding.
properties.instruction:
Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood
deaths occur in vehicles.

Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

NWSheadline: FLOOD ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 11 PM AST THIS EVENING

properties.areaDesc: Aguada, PR; Aguadilla, PR; Moca, PR; San Sebastian, PR
properties.headline: Flood Warning issued March 27 at 5:56PM AST until March 28 at 5:00AM AST by NWS San Juan PR
properties.description:
* WHAT...Small stream flooding caused by excessive rainfall is
expected.

* WHERE...Along Rio Culebrinas in Aguada, Aguadilla, Moca and San
Sebastian.

* WHEN...Until 500 AM AST Saturday.

* IMPACTS...Flooding of rivers, creeks, streams, and other low-lying
and flood-prone locations is imminent or occurring.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- At 553 PM AST, USGS gage reports indicated that Rio
Culebrinas is almost at minor flood stage in Aguada.
Additionally, the upstream gage continues to increase. This
could result in river flood later in the evening hours.
Flooding is ongoing or expected to begin shortly in the
warned area.
- Low water crossings in Sector Cocos, Barrio Marias in Moca.
Road PR-110, km 10.1 interior. Around Barrio Espinar in
Aguada.
properties.instruction:
Turn around, don't drown when encountering flooded roads. Most flood
deaths occur in vehicles.

Be especially cautious at night when it is harder to recognize the
dangers of flooding.

NWSheadline: FLOOD WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 5 AM AST SATURDAY

title: Current watches, warnings, and advisories for Puerto Rico
